name: Write nginx reload hook
description: Writes /etc/proxvex/reload_certificates so the acme-renew loop can trigger 'nginx -s reload' after installing or renewing a certificate. Skipped when addon-acme is not enabled (no acme_san).

parameters.name: VM ID
parameters.description: VM ID — used to look up the running container's actual hostname (the one volumes are named after, which can differ from the input hostname during reconfigure).
